legend.title: In case you're a bit lost...
legend.feat: Stands for "Feature". Used for feature additions.
legend.chore: Changes that aren't a bugfix, nor a feature addition.
legend.theme: For OpenTaiko Hub theme additions, and changes.

troubleshoot.title: Support / Bug report
troubleshoot.intro: If you encounter an issue or are searching for support about OpenTaiko, please refer to the following links:
troubleshoot.note: Note: Be sure to do your own research before asking as the issue might have been treated before, be sure to check Discord's #often_asked_question channel too.

versioning.title: Skin / Asset versioning
versioning.compat: All the numbers up to the minor update number (ie. v[0.6.0].2) need to match between a skin and a game version in order to be compatible.
versioning.optional: It is not mandatory for some asset (character/puchichara) updates as they do not necessarily follow the strict versioning patterns skins do.
versioning.revision: The revision number (ie. v0.6.0.[2]) is incremented at each game/skin update that do not imply mandatory changes and do not need to match.
versioning.example: Example: a skin with a 0.6.1.3 version number will work with any OpenTaiko version from 0.6.1.0 and will stop to be compatible from 0.6.2.0.
versioning.wip: This section will be completed in future OpenTaiko Hub updates depending on found issues.

peepo_origin.subtitle: Original Latest
peepo_origin.text: The original version by samyuu, for regular charts without the experimental features.

peepo_optk.subtitle: OpenTaiko Team Latest
peepo_optk.text: The version continued by Komi and OpenTaiko Team members, adding experimental features supported by OpenTaiko and enhancing regular editing.

tja_tools.title: TJA Tools
tja_tools.subtitle: WHMHammer's fork
tja_tools.text: Visualize your charts and check stats about them on the go!

arrow_vortex.title: Arrow Vortex
arrow_vortex.subtitle: Official Latest
arrow_vortex.text: The recommended tool to sync your charts trouble free!

subtitle_edit.title: Subtitle Edit
subtitle_edit.subtitle: Official Latest
subtitle_edit.text: The recommended tool to make VTT files for your charts!

submission.title: Song submission form
submission.subtitle: For your songs
submission.text: You can submit your songs here for the OpenTaiko soundtrack! Charts are usually made within 2 weeks if the song is accepted.

suggestion.title: Song suggestion form
suggestion.subtitle: For other artists
suggestion.text: You can recommand artists here whose songs you think would fit for OpenTaiko!
